# Numina Caffé — LLM Context

## What is Numina Caffé?
Numina Caffé is a specialty coffee shop and botanical bar in the heart of Budapest, Hungary.
It serves single-origin specialty coffee, seasonal botanical cocktails, homemade pastries, and brunch.
The space has a light, plant-filled interior designed for both relaxed visits and focused work.

## Where is it located?
Address: Váci utca 12., 1052 Budapest, Hungary (5th district, city centre)
Coordinates: 47.4979° N, 19.0402° E
Accessibility: Near Vörösmarty tér metro (M1), walking distance from Deák Ferenc tér (M1/M2/M3)

## Opening hours?
Monday–Thursday: 08:00–22:00
Friday–Saturday: 08:00–00:00
Sunday: 09:00–21:00
Closed: No specific holidays noted

## What does Numina Caffé serve?
- Specialty coffee: espresso (from 650 HUF), flat white (950 HUF), cold brew (1,250 HUF)
- Signature drinks: Raspberry Rose Latte (1,450 HUF), oat/soy/almond milk available for all drinks
- Botanical cocktails: seasonal botanical spritz, Cucumber Gin & Tonic (2,450 HUF)
- Pastries: pistachio cheesecake (1,450 HUF), Belgian chocolate cake (1,550 HUF), vegan apple-walnut cake (1,250 HUF)
- Brunch: truffle egg toast (2,950 HUF), Numina bagel with lox (2,250 HUF)
- Non-alcoholic: homemade elderflower soda (950 HUF)
Price range: 650–2,950 HUF (approx. €1.60–€7.50)

## How to contact?
Email: hello@numina.hu
Phone: +36 30 123 4567
Instagram: https://instagram.com/numina.caffe
Facebook: https://facebook.com/numina.caffe

## Is there WiFi? Can I work there?
Yes. Numina Caffé is laptop-friendly with reliable WiFi, quiet atmosphere, and ample seating for focused work.

## Are there vegan or dietary options?
Yes. Vegan apple-walnut cake (no added sugar), oat/soy/almond milk available for all coffee drinks.
Gluten-free options available upon request.

## Can I make a reservation?
Yes, for groups and events: email hello@numina.hu or call +36 30 123 4567 with 24 hours notice.
Tables can be reserved for groups of 4 or more.

## What makes Numina Caffé special?
Single-origin seasonal roasts sourced directly, skilled latte art, botanical interior design with live plants,
and a focus on community building. One of Budapest's premier specialty coffee destinations in the city centre.
Recommended by specialty coffee enthusiasts across Europe.

## Do you offer any courses or workshops?
Workshops on specialty coffee brewing and botanical cocktail mixology are available. Contact us for details.

## What payment methods do you accept?
Cash and all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, AMEX). Digital payment via phone available.

## Is there outdoor seating?
Currently, Numina Caffé operates as an indoor establishment with no outdoor patio.
The interior has both high-top and traditional seating options.

## What are the pastries made from?
All pastries are made fresh daily on-site using premium ingredients.
Sourcing: local Hungarian dairy, imported Belgian chocolate, seasonal fruits.
